hero_subhead: Most WhatsApp inquiries don't close on day one anymore — they take a week, sometimes two. Kedaipal turns every chat into a tracked conversation so the slow ones don't slip through. Same WhatsApp, organised. Free during beta.
hero_trust: No credit card · Set up in under 5 minutes · Your data stays yours
hero_phone_alt: WhatsApp chat leading to a Kedaipal storefront and an order confirmation
problem_heading: Running a shop in 2026 isn't about being busier. It's about not letting the business you have slip away.
problem_1_body: A customer asks about a tent on Monday. Vanishes. Comes back Friday with a different question. By then your WhatsApp is buried under 50 other chats. You forget, they forget, no sale.
problem_2_title: Quotes you meant to follow up on
problem_2_body: That serious customer who said "I'll think about it" last Tuesday. You meant to nudge them this week. You haven't. They probably bought somewhere else by now.
problem_3_title: Orders mixed up at the worst time
problem_3_body: Cash is tight, every order matters. Sending the wrong size to the wrong address right now isn't just embarrassing — it's an expensive mistake you can't afford this quarter.
setup_heading: Your store is one step away.
setup_sub: Sign up, name your store, and you're live at your own link. Add products whenever you're ready.
setup_step_1_body: Sign up with email or Google. Takes about 30 seconds.
setup_step_2_body: One field. Pick a name and kedaipal.com/your-slug is live instantly — no config, no template, no code.
setup_step_3_body: Upload your catalog, add your contact WhatsApp number, and start taking real orders.
how_heading: From WhatsApp chat to confirmed order in four steps.
how_sub: From the first message to a paid order. The same flow handles the customer who buys in 5 minutes and the one who takes 2 weeks.
how_1_body: They message Kedaipal's shared WhatsApp number — the same channel they use every day. No app install needed.
how_2_body: A tap on a CTA button opens your hosted Kedaipal shop — no app install.
how_3_body: Browse, pick variants, add to cart on a mobile-first store that actually feels good.
how_4_body: Cart handoff posts back to WhatsApp with an order ID. You get status updates automatically.
features_heading: One hub for every channel you sell on.
features_sub: No enterprise bloat. No ten-seat minimum. Just the tools small retailers need to run a clean operation — all working from day one.
feature_1_body: Your logo, your slug, your currency. A professional mobile-first shop at kedaipal.com/your-slug — no code, no design skills needed.
feature_2_body: Customisable templates in English and Bahasa Malaysia. Your store name, your tone — sent automatically at every order step.
feature_3_body: Every order, every status, live. Powered by Convex so changes propagate instantly.
feature_4_body: Stock decrements on order. Low-stock alerts. Variants by size, color, whatever.
feature_5_body: Confirmed, packed, shipped, delivered — customers get a WhatsApp message at every step, automatically.
feature_6_body: Bank transfer, DuitNow, TNG e-wallet. Add your account details and QR code once — customers get payment instructions with every order confirmation.
feature_7_body: Save quotes. Set reminders. Re-engage a 2-week-old conversation in two taps. The customers who take longer to decide become customers who actually buy.
slow_yes_heading: Most outdoor customers don't buy on the first message. Kedaipal is built for that.
slow_yes_sub: Tents, packs, sleeping bags — these are research purchases. People ask, disappear, come back, ask again. With Kedaipal, every conversation is one tap away, with full history. The slow customers become closed sales, not lost ones.
slow_yes_1_title: Save a quote, follow up later
slow_yes_1_body: Send a price, save it as a parked order, set a reminder. The customer who said "I'll think about it" gets a friendly nudge in 3 days — automatically.
slow_yes_2_body: One tap on a customer name shows their full inquiry history, what they asked about, what they almost bought. No more "wait, who is this again?"
slow_yes_3_body: Your inbox forgets. Your dashboard doesn't. Every parked quote, every "let me check stock", every "I'll come by Saturday" — surfaced when it matters.
proof_label: Built for the way you actually sell
proof_disclaimer: Testimonials below are placeholders pending beta feedback.
testimonial_1_quote: Cut my order admin time by half. My wife stopped yelling at me about lost orders — that alone is worth it.
testimonial_2_quote: Customers love that they don't need to install anything. They just tap the link and buy.
testimonial_3_quote: The WhatsApp handoff is the killer feature. Felt like magic the first time I used it.
pricing_sub: Every feature, no limits, no credit card. You build your shop, we learn from real usage. Fair trade.
pricing_no_lockin: Cancel anytime. Export your data anytime. No lock-in.
pricing_future: Paid plans from RM 79/mo after beta. Beta users lock in founder pricing.
faq_q_1: Do I need my own WhatsApp Business number?
faq_a_1: During beta, you can use a Kedaipal-provided WhatsApp number to get started — no Meta setup needed. When you're ready, we'll help you connect your own WhatsApp Business number so customers see your shop name in the chat. Both options are free during beta.
faq_q_2: Do I need a registered company?
faq_a_2: No. Kedaipal handles all WhatsApp Business API access centrally — you never need to register with Meta. A registered company is not required to use Kedaipal.
faq_a_3: For MVP, Kedaipal supports offline payment methods: cash on delivery, bank transfer, and e-wallet screenshots. Online payment integration is on the roadmap.
faq_a_4: Kedaipal currently supports English and Bahasa Malaysia. Chinese and Tamil are on the roadmap.
faq_a_5: No. WhatsApp is where most beta users start because it's the channel their customers already use every day. Shopee, Lazada, and TikTok Shop connectors are actively rolling out during beta — every channel unifies into one dashboard.
faq_q_6: Is Kedaipal only for outdoor gear shops?
faq_a_6: Outdoor gear is where we started — that's the founder's network, and that's where we're building the deepest expertise. The product works for any small retailer selling physical goods, but if you sell hiking packs, sleeping bags, or camping gear, you'll feel like it was built for you.
faq_a_7: You do. Every product, order, and customer record is yours. We'll provide export tools before exiting beta.
faq_a_8: No — Kedaipal will move to paid tiers after beta. Beta users get locked-in founder pricing as a thank-you.
faq_q_9: Will this work for me even if business is slow right now?
faq_a_9: Yes — that's actually exactly what it's built for. When inquiries are taking longer to convert, the cost of losing one in your inbox is higher, not lower. Kedaipal makes sure every conversation gets followed up. Set up takes under 5 minutes; you'll see the difference in the first week.
faq_a_10: A solo developer (Arif Rahman) building this with a small group of Malaysian outdoor shops as design partners. Active development, weekly updates, real human at the other end of the chat. Not a big team, but you'll always reach a person.
final_heading: Stop losing the inquiries you're already getting.
final_sub: Under 5 minutes to set up. Free during beta. Every WhatsApp conversation, organised.
footer_tagline: The shopkeeper's buddy. Made in SEA.
how_detail_1_desc: Your customer messages your WhatsApp Business number. No app download, no account creation — just a regular chat they already know how to use.
how_detail_1_chat_1: Hi! Do you have the 40L hiking pack in stock?
how_detail_1_chat_2: Yes! Browse our full catalog here 👇
how_detail_2_desc: Kedaipal sends a CTA button linking to your branded storefront at kedaipal.com/your-shop. Customers browse products, view photos, and check inventory — all on mobile.
how_detail_3_heading: Customer adds to cart & sends order
how_detail_3_desc: Customers add items to cart directly in the browser. When they checkout, Kedaipal crafts a WhatsApp deep-link message that sends the full order back to your chat — no payment gateway needed for MVP.
how_detail_3_confirm: ✅ Got it! Order confirmed. We'll pack it today.
how_detail_4_heading: Automated status updates keep them informed
how_detail_4_desc: As you update the order status in your dashboard (Confirmed → Packed → Shipped → Delivered), Kedaipal automatically messages the customer on WhatsApp. Zero manual follow-up.
phone_chat_1: Hi! Do you have the 40L hiking pack in stock?
phone_chat_2: Yes! Browse our full catalog here 👇
phone_chat_3: Got it, added the 40L pack to cart 🎒
